overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring heavy acid rain, thick yellow-green atmospheric haze, and streets illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements. The player character navigates wet reflective sidewalks, crosses wide intersections, and walks beneath towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk approaching major intersection

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
beginning to cross the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet reflective sidewalk toward a crosswalk, surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket with glowing blue backpack walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: large pink digital billboard displaying a barcode pattern and circular logo
tall modern skyscraper with distinctive stepped pyramid architecture and illuminated windows
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow parallel lines on wet pavement
elevated highway or walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the ego character walking behind a pedestrian in a white jacket. Neon signs cast colorful reflections on the wet pavement as they approach a wide intersection. The camera waits for vehicles to pass before beginning to cross the yellow-striped crosswalk, with a massive glass pyramid skyscraper looming in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of fog-shrouded skyscrapers
camera returns to forward-facing position to continue crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while pausing to look up at the towering neon-lit buildings overhead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: suspended digital advertisement screen hovering above the street level
massive building disappearing into the yellow-green fog and clouds above

segments.scene_description: The ego character moves through the expansive intersection, with the camera dramatically tilting upward to showcase the immense scale of the fog-covered skyscrapers. Floating holographic billboards hover between buildings while vehicles pass through the cross streets. The atmosphere is thick with yellow-green haze, and neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk corridor with metal railings and neon storefronts

events.description: moving from open intersection into enclosed sidewalk area with building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a metal railing, passing illuminated storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing red neon umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: black metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street level below
series of bright illuminated signs including a butterfly logo and yellow text displays
vertical array of glowing advertisement screens on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more enclosed sidewalk corridor with a metal railing on the left and building walls on the right. The ego walks past various neon storefront signs and digital poster walls. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing red umbrella approaches from the opposite direction, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with large digital billboards and pedestrian activity

events.description: encountering a denser crowd of pedestrians with various colored umbrellas

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing groups of pedestrians with neon umbrellas and approaching a street corner

notable_agents.action: person with blue umbrella standing near the street corner
person crouching down near a building wall next to trash bags

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying a face with sunglasses and the text '2'
tall vertical illuminated sign with green neon characters
red and white striped barrier near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a moderately crowded sidewalk with pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas. The ego passes a large digital billboard featuring a face with sunglasses and approaches a street corner with a green vertical neon sign in the distance. The environment maintains the dense cyberpunk atmosphere with wet streets reflecting the myriad of neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, transitioning from a wide, towering intersection into a dense, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins on a wet street following a pedestrian in a white jacket toward a yellow-striped crosswalk, with a massive glass pyramid skyscraper looming through the haze. As the camera crosses the intersection, it tilts dramatically upward to reveal the immense scale of fog-shrouded skyscrapers and floating holographic billboards suspended in a thick yellow-green atmosphere. The scene then shifts from the open road into a more enclosed sidewalk corridor, passing metal railings and digital poster walls as a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella approaches. Finally, the camera weaves through a crowd of colorful umbrellas and past a large digital billboard of a face with sunglasses, moving toward a distant green neon sign at a street corner.
